lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is in pristine condition with no visible damage. The interior is like new and shows no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and several large dents. The interior is heavily worn with multiple tears in the upholstery and visible stains. The car has major mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs to be roadworthy.

Experience perfection with this stunning, showroom-quality vehicle! It is in truly mint condition, showing no signs of wear inside or out. Meticulously maintained and looking absolutely flawless, this car drives exactly like the day it was first sold. It’s a rare find for anyone seeking a vehicle in a pristine, like-new state!

This vehicle is in impeccable, showroom-ready condition, representing the absolute highest standard of care. The exterior finish is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like gloss with no chips, scratches, or imperfections of any kind. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-new condition, with the upholstery and trim showing zero signs of wear. Mechanically, it performs perfectly, having been strictly maintained according to the manufacturer's schedule. This is a collector-grade example that offers a truly like-new driving experience.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in good condition, showing consistent maintenance and care. The engine is robust and starts reliably, while the transmission provides smooth shifting across all gears. The exterior and interior are well-kept, with only minor cosmetic wear expected from regular use. All major systems are functioning properly, making this a dependable choice for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, an exemplar of automotive preservation maintained to the most exacting standards. This specimen displays a flawless aesthetic profile, characterized by its pristine original finish and an interior entirely devoid of wear. Every mechanical system has been rigorously inspected to ensure it operates with the absolute precision of a showroom-fresh unit. For the discerning individual seeking a vehicle in peerless condition, this acquisition represents an unparalleled opportunity to secure a benchmark-quality example of its class.

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you—this beauty is in truly flawless condition! It's been pampered since day one, garage-kept, and honestly looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership price tag, you’ve found it. Come check it out, you won't be disappointed!

This E92 M3 is a superlative example of the high-revving S65 platform. The 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 delivers linear power through eight individual throttle bodies, peaking at a breathtaking 8,400 RPM redline. This unit is equipped with a precise 6-speed manual transmission and the M Variable Differential Lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution across the rear axle. The chassis is exceptionally taut, featuring the Competition Package (ZCP) suspension geometry and Electronic Damper Control (EDC) for adjustable damping rates. Preventative maintenance is comprehensive, including recent rod bearing replacement and upgraded throttle actuators to ensure the long-term integrity of the internal rotating assembly. The exterior finish is flawless, with no evidence of road rash or oxidation, while the undercarriage remains dry and free of any fluid seepage. This is a collector-grade specimen for the enthusiast seeking a mechanically sound, atmospheric driving experience.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Flawless interior and exterior.

This pristine vehicle is a true collector's dream, meticulously maintained to the highest standards. The exterior features original factory paint with a deep, mirror-like gloss and zero imperfections, recently protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state, featuring supple, unscuffed leather and that distinct 'new car' scent; it has been strictly garage-kept, smoke-free, and pet-free. Mechanically, the car is flawless, boasting a comprehensive service history with every scheduled maintenance performed at the authorized dealership. With brand-new performance tires and a spotless undercarriage, this vehicle offers a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. All original keys, manuals, and records are included.

We are privileged to present this peerless example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in an impeccable state, having been curated with exhaustive attention to detail and stored in a climate-controlled environment. Every surface, from the flawless coachwork to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Mechanically superior and aesthetically indistinguishable from its original showroom delivery, this offering represents a definitive acquisition for the most discerning enthusiast.

We are privileged to present this peerless vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that exceeds typical expectations for its class. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting impeccable aesthetic preservation and flawless mechanical integrity. For the discerning individual who demands an investment-grade automotive experience, this offering represents the pinnacle of its market segment.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels brand new? I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s in total mint condition! I have babied this car from day one—it’s spotless, runs like a dream, and still has that fresh feel inside and out. You really won't find one better cared for than this beauty. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have! Come take a look and see for yourself!

This 997.2-generation Carrera S represents a pinnacle of mechanical preservation, featuring the coveted 3.8L naturally aspirated flat-six with Direct Fuel Injection (DFI). The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed longitudinal manual transaxle and a factory-optioned limited-slip differential, providing superlative tactile feedback. Chassis dynamics are managed via Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM), ensuring the multi-link rear and MacPherson strut front geometry remain perfectly poised. This specimen exhibits zero bore scoring, original paint thickness across all panels, and flawless synchromesh engagement. Meticulously maintained with a documented service history, this is a concours-grade example for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Full service history. Inspection welcome.

Experience automotive perfection with this collector-grade masterpiece. This vehicle is in breathtaking showroom condition, having been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like paint finish without a single stone chip or swirl mark, complemented by pristine alloy wheels. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh state, boasting supple, unmarked leather upholstery and that unmistakable new-car aroma. Every mechanical component has been maintained to the highest standard with a comprehensive, proactive service history, ensuring a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it rolled off the assembly line. From the crystal-clear instrumentation to the perfectly functioning electronics, no detail has been overlooked. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly immaculate, turn-key example that will satisfy even the most discerning enthusiast.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. With its flawless finish and peerless mechanical integrity, this represents a premier acquisition for the discerning motorist who demands nothing short of perfection.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior and an interior that retains its original factory freshness. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector seeking a vehicle of peerless integrity and mechanical perfection.

Hey friends! 🚗 Take a look at this absolute gem! I’ve taken such good care of this beauty, and it’s honestly in pristine, showroom condition. It drives like it just rolled off the lot and looks even better in person! If you’re looking for a ride that’s been truly loved and kept in top-notch shape, this is the one for you. I’m so excited for someone to get behind the wheel and enjoy it!

This specimen represents the pinnacle of the E46 chassis, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six with high-pressure VANOS and individual throttle bodies. This example is in museum-grade condition, showing zero subframe fatigue and a meticulously maintained Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. The suspension geometry remains factory-perfect with refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers. Every mechanical component, from the limited-slip differential to the cooling system, has been scrutinized to ensure peak performance. The exterior boasts original paint with exceptional depth, while the interior remains free of bolster wear or dash UV damage. A true turn-key investment for the discerning collector.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history available.

This vehicle is a true collector-grade example, maintained with obsessive care and presented in showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, glass-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or swirl marks, while the interior remains pristine—the leather is supple, the carpets are spotless, and every electronic component functions as if it just left the factory. Mechanically, it is flawless, featuring a comprehensive service history and a drive that is tight, quiet, and powerful. Always garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in inclement weather, this car represents the absolute pinnacle of its model year. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that looks and feels brand new, this is the finest example currently available on the market.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising caliber. This vehicle remains in superlative condition, reflecting a meticulous history of preservation and care. Every facet, from its pristine exterior finish to its refined interior appointments, adheres to the highest standards of excellence. We invite discerning collectors to acquire a vehicle that transcends the standard pre-owned market.

We are privileged to present this peerless example, maintained in documented showroom condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, exhibiting an immaculate exterior finish and a cabin preserved in its original state. Rigorously inspected and verified for mechanical excellence, this specimen offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector who accepts only the finest automotive standards.

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly pristine condition—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken meticulous care of it, and it runs like an absolute dream. You won't find a single scratch or hiccup here. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you! Come swing by and see it for yourself!

This E92 M3 represents the pinnacle of high-revving naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S65 4.0L V8 power plant with individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. This showroom-quality example boasts a pristine chassis with zero oxidation and a meticulously documented service history. The M-DCT dual-clutch transmission provides lightning-fast gear synchronization, paired with the M-variable differential lock for surgical power delivery. The suspension features Electronic Damper Control (EDC) for adaptive damping, while the Competition Package (ZCP) ensures optimized roll center and steering response. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service, ensuring the internal tolerances remain within factory specifications. A truly collector-grade specimen with a flawless finish and a concours-ready undercarriage.
Mint condition. One owner. Zero defects. Garage kept. All maintenance records included.

This exceptional vehicle is in true showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since its original purchase. The exterior features a mirror-like finish with absolutely zero imperfections, dings, or stone chips, while the interior remains pristine with supple, unworn leather and the original factory scent. Mechanically, it is flawless; every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, ensuring the engine and transmission operate with factory-fresh precision. The undercarriage is spotless, and the alloy wheels are entirely free of curb rash or pitting. For the discerning buyer seeking a collector-grade example that drives as perfectly as it looks, this car represents the absolute pinnacle of its class.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary vehicle maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive preservation. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics, featuring a pristine exterior finish and an interior entirely devoid of wear. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the unwavering precision of a factory-new unit, a testament to its history of meticulous stewardship. For the discerning driver who demands uncompromising quality and absolute mechanical integrity, this offering represents the definitive standard in its class.
